ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "eye_condition" TEXT /* Any eye condition or disorder the participant may have */,
  "experiment_group" TEXT /* Group assignment for the experiment */,
  "recruitment_source" TEXT /* Source of recruitment (e.g., university, social media) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "task" TEXT /* Task or stimulus used in the trial */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the trial in the experiment */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus used in the trial (e.g., image, video) */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used (e.g., image, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, video) */,
  "stimulus_file" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixations" (
  "fixation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixation */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the fixation belongs to */,
  "fixation_no" INTEGER /* Fixation number in the trial */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the fixation */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the fixation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the fixation */,
  "position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the fixation position */,
  "position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the fixation position */,
  "pupil_size" INTEGER /* Pupil size during the fixation */,
  "eye_used" TEXT /* Eye used during the fixation (LEFT or RIGHT) */,
  "gaze_velocity" REAL /* Gaze velocity during the fixation */,
  "gaze_acceleration" REAL /* Gaze acceleration during the fixation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaze_paths" (
  "gaze_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaze path */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the gaze path belongs to */,
  "gaze_path_no" INTEGER /* Gaze path number in the trial */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the gaze path */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the gaze path */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the gaze path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gaze_path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaze_paths_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaze_path_fixations" (
  "gaze_path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gaze path */,
  "fixation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixation */,
  "fixation_no" INTEGER /* Fixation number in the gaze path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gaze_path_id", "fixation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., fixation duration, pupil size) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "parameter1" REAL /* Parameter 1 for the analysis */,
  "parameter2" REAL /* Parameter 2 for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
